h1.visual_description: Large, bold, numbered (e.g., 3, 4), left-aligned with significant vertical padding above.

h2.visual_description: Bold, numbered with decimal (e.g., 4.1), left-aligned, slightly smaller than h1.

h3.visual_description: Bold text at the start of a paragraph, followed by a period, immediately followed by body text on the same line.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Specific terminology or dataset names enclosed in single curly quotes

markdown_grammar.table_style: html (required for complex multi-level headers and merged cells as seen in Table 1)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-Year parenthetical format with blue hyperlinking

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: No headers, footers, or page numbers are visible in this specific segment; ignore potential artifacts at extreme top/bottom edges.
